mapper.select:
SELECT jg_guide_item.id, jg_guide_item.name, jg_guide_item.image, jg_guide_item.title, jg_guide_item.price, jg_guide_item.pub_date as pubDate, 0 AS thumbCount, 0 AS commentCount FROM jg_guide_item
ORDER BY id DESC
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jg_guide_item (name, image, title, price, pub_date) VALUES (#{name}, #{image}, #{title}, #{price}, #{pubDate})
